session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the full output. Do not fix anything, just report results.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command from the repository root and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci make target from repo root

session.assistant:
## make fast-ci Results
**Status: FAILED** (Exit code 2)
### Summary
The fast-ci target encountered one blocking failure:
**Exec Reference Check - FAILED** - `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is out of date - Action needed: Run `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` to regenerate
### Detailed Results
**Prettier Check** - Code style issues found in 3 files (need --write to fix) - Warnings in: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/planning/label-scheme.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md Check** - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired (19 files checked) - Violations: 0
**Lint** - All checks passed!
**Format Check** - 1666 files already formatted
**Type Check (ty)** - All checks passed!
**Unit Tests** - erk: 5876 passed in 22.31s - erk-dev: 136 passed in 4.30s - erk-statusline: 115 passed in 0.81s - erk-mcp: 24 passed (output truncated)
### Primary Issue
The blocking failure is the outdated exec reference documentation. The exec reference check requires regeneration via `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs`.
